zh.lifeSummary: 當Barbara Fielding於1509年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃時，她的父親William Fielding38歲，母親Elizabeth Poultney32歲。她於1533年與Richard Cave在英國諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1535年在英國萊希斯特斯爾皮可維爾享年26歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Barbara Fielding于1509年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃时，她的父亲William Fielding38岁，母亲Elizabeth Poultney32岁。她于1533年与Richard Cave在英国諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1535年在英国萊希斯特斯爾皮可維爾享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fielding
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occasionally from a Middle English survival of Old English felding ‘dweller in the field(s), open country’.
Irish: possibly a variant of McField (see McPhail ).

variants.name: Fielden
meanings: English: from a Middle English survival of the dative plural of Old English feld, denoting someone who lived ‘in the fields’. The lost district name Feldon in Warwickshire may be named with this word. Perhaps also a habitational name from Feldom in Marske, North Yorkshire, recorded as Feldon in 1231. See Field .

nameMeanings.name: Barbara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

variants.name: Barbra
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

en.lifeSummary: When Barbara Fielding was born in 1509, in Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England, her father, William Fielding, was 38 and her mother, Elizabeth Poultney, was 32. She married Richard Cave in 1533, in Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1535, in Pickwell, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Barbara Fielding est née en 1509, à Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, William Fielding, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Poultney, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Cave en 1533, à Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1535, à Pickwell, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Barbara Fielding 1509 in Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Fielding 38 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Poultney 32. Sie hat 1533 in Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England Richard Cave geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1535 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Pickwell, Leicestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Barbara Fielding è nata il nel 1509 nel Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, William Fielding, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Poultney, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Richard Cave nel 1533, nel Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1535, nel Pickwell, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Barbara Fieldingが1509年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスタンフォード オン アボンで生まれた時，父William Fieldingは38歳，母Elizabeth Poultneyは32歳であった。1533年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスタンフォード オン アボンでRichard Caveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1535年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアピックウエルで26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Barbara Fielding(이)가 1509년 영국 노르섬프토실르 스탠퍼드  아폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Fielding(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Poultney(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1533년 영국 노르섬프토실르 스탠퍼드  아폰에서 Richard Cave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1535년 영국 레이스스터실르 피ck웰에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Barbara Fielding nasceu em 1509, em Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Fielding, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Poultney, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Cave em 1533, em Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1535, em Pickwell, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Barbara Fielding родилась в 1509 г. в местности станфорд он авон, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Fielding было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Poultney, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Cave в 1533 г. в местности станфорд он авон, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1535 г. в местности пикквелл, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Barbara Fielding nació en 1509, en Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Fielding, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Poultney, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Richard Cave en 1533, en Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1535, en Pickwell, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 26 años.
